textByHash.aacf7b4e93297f14f594a134de5fc01006e818ee: This is the Champions' Guild. Only adventurers who have proved themselves worthy by gaining influence from quests are allowed in here.
textByHash.0188901cc4c1b4c0f2dbaaa94c3746af64579a9d: Yes! A mighty and perilous quest fit only for the most powerful champions! And, at the end of it, you will earn the right to wear the legendary rune platebody!
textByHash.0e595e2b1177a667de399ebb21e9abf2b9b95b1d: You'll have to speak to Oziach, the maker of rune armour. He sets the quests that champions must complete in order to wear it.
textByHash.37b9746d405781a8da9884b841b0aea7956a1c0d: Oziach lives in a hut, by the cliffs to the west of Edgeville. He can be a little...odd...sometimes, though.
textByHash.01c29d718d1384f10aa93eed15d79e7e5331683b: You're already on a quest for me, if I recall correctly. Have you talked to Oziach yet?
textByHash.96b4abba0f9a63207252412710d6c8e05b8d3ffe: Well, he's the only one who can grant you the right to wear rune platemail. He lives in a hut, by the cliffs west of Edgeville.
textByHash.f2f199373cc0bb3b6238781cd15dadea2cf2e101: Oh? What did he tell you to do?
textByHash.9af851208d356effaf722f532788018a5559d866: Goodness, he hasn't given you an easy job, has he?
textByHash.cb1372cf1e7f33d2d83a6e64928d85a76212917b: Thirty years ago, Crandor was a thriving community with a great tradition of mages and adventurers. Many Crandorians even earned the right to be part of the Champions' Guild!
textByHash.9615d369edaff7bf1c918d81e874a0e761234e4d: One of their adventurers went too far, however. He descended into the volcano in the centre of Crandor and woke the dragon Elvarg.
textByHash.66c41ef9db7ae621bdccf66fa1490e2b7b022e07: He must have fought valiantly against the dragon because they say that, to this day, she has a scar down her side,
textByHash.7e7e9dee46c4a86d7bfe9a25256bed7ffc998382: but the dragon still won the fight. She emerged and laid waste to the whole of Crandor with her fire breath!
textByHash.8c5d83c8b65a834248d3742429b822325c444fb8: Some refugees managed to escape in fishing boats. They landed on the coast, north of Rimmington, and set up camp but the dragon followed them and burned the camp to the ground.
textByHash.acbdcd46a7f2241868ac0845da879499743d0254: Out of all the people of Crandor there were only three survivors: a trio of wizards who used magic to escape. Their names were Thalzar, Lozar and Melzar.
textByHash.6fde3a89cbfc34a5ba26308739ce279062edc061: If you're serious about taking on Elvarg, first you'll need to get to Crandor, and to my knowledge, the only way to do that is by sea.
textByHash.53a50fe995eae519929073193340619f94d5eda8: If only that were true. The island is surrounded by dangerous underwater reefs. You'll need a map to guide you through them and a ship capable of doing so.
textByHash.574bd90a6c57d131e9222bc5526fc9a204689e69: And then of course there's the dragon herself. Once you reach Crandor, you'll need some kind of protection against her breath.
textByHash.d807de329e0feb60ac9b4646278897c0a3e8b7de: After what happened, people were afraid of enraging the dragon. Most maps to the island were destroyed, but I have heard that one survived. It was held by Melzar, Thalzar and Lozar.
textByHash.1c32885d1ccbfd96632d4a9776344dd076afdc10: However, the three apparently split the map into three pieces, which each of them taking one piece.
textByHash.382ffe54ffa3b29efe6a4959951a760adc0defd4: Melzar built a castle on the site of the Crandorian refugee camp, north of Rimmington. He's locked himself in there and no one's seen him for years.
textByHash.8183d50452edf42bb2f7d92745cd4b3a7ed7cd08: The inside of his castle is like a maze, and is populated by undead monsters. Maybe, if you could get all the way through the maze, you could find his piece of the map.
textByHash.05a1edb1e9344e030844043965a5e9b584598bdb: Adventurers sometimes go in there to prove themselves, so I can give you this key to Melzar's Maze.
textByHash.9258a4cad8bc601926416736c7793c4e65eaa418: Thalzar was the most paranoid of the three wizards. He hid his map piece and took the secret of its location to his grave.
textByHash.bbd3ead536d1d779c6a1bf170f86393c6dee1a31: I don't think you'd be able to find out where it is by ordinary means. You'll need to talk to the Oracle on Ice Mountain.
textByHash.ff897d0bb82dccf2c78ac1c664542fa95a668d38: A few weeks ago, I'd have told you to speak to Lozar herself, in her house across the river from Lumbridge.
textByHash.33426be8607b48f7f80ccaa8f8b310518db52f5e: Unfortunately, goblin raiders killed her and stole everything. One of the goblins from the Goblin Village probably has the map piece now.
textByHash.56e1f8f1462e6a2fe11e6af40b88031efa3fe0b2: Quite a specific one I'm afraid. Even with a map, very few ships will be able to navigate the reefs around the island. You're going to need one of Crandorian design.
textByHash.21529d9cea086b5ad680aaaed792a3fc4bcbf3a7: If there's still one in existence, it's probably in Port Sarim. However, a ship will also need a captain, and I'm not sure where you'd find one willing to sail to Crandor!
textByHash.66695cb8c8b1959643ef301bbb98d0b1aca3f2f8: I suppose you could, but given you have a dragon to be dealing with, I'd suggest getting someone else to worry about the captaining for you.
textByHash.03f9b0fc84b9c13cd4a797d4bfdecfd37cfbacfd: That part shouldn't be too difficult, actually. I believe the Duke of Lumbridge has a special shield in his armoury that is enchanted against dragon's breath.
textByHash.32989bd83d8a1e5f355e349a9d0283a2e5ba53a8: You are a true hero. There's no way that Oziach can refuse to sell you rune platemail now. You should tell him at once!
textByHash.459a8af8246d0e1fa0b9e2e72bcd793d059ceb6e: Let me see what you've got there. Ah, yes, one of the champions. Just head downstairs and you'll find your challenge waiting in the arena. Hand that scroll to the doorman to get in.
textByHash.d158bfa8a550f5e75f1aca3d07090a7e661eb46a: I think you've already got a key. Maybe you should check your key ring.
textByHash.24e9b4e5dfdcb02ce5e3f09b6f13f932291f5343: I think you've already got a key somewhere.
textByHash.2592e1d73aa8ebecfb814ac49ef0c6bfd5e963f4: You have not proved yourself worthy to enter here yet.
textByHash.20178a0b230d63a0f408e6d5fd61d79d9f32367e: Greetings bold adventurer. Welcome to the guild of Champions.
